channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Lou’s Lagoon adds PS5 and Xbox Series versions, launches in 2026
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Official story trailer releasd.

Cozy island adventure Lou’s Lagoon will launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series alongside its previously announced Switch and PC (Steam) versions in 2026, publishers Megabit and rokaplay, and developer Tiny Roar announced. It will also support Xbox Play Anywhere.

“As huge console gamers since our childhood and the whole team having different favorite platforms, it is a huge honor to bring Lou’s Lagoon to so many players at launch,” said game director Robert Koch in a press release. “We think you should play games, where and how you want to play them, but it is not always possible due to time and budget constraints. Thanks to Megabit’s efforts and the welcoming arms of Nintendo, Sony, Valve, and Xbox we will invite ALL of you to the Limbo archipelago, sporting your favorite controller in hand—we can’t wait.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Megabit:

About

Lou’s Lagoon is a cozy exploration and crafting adventure, set in the tropical archipelago of Limbo. Arriving after a storm has hit the islands, players take to the skies in their trusty seaplane to help the islanders back on their feet, rebuild damaged communities, and unravel the mystery of Uncle Lou’s disappearance. The game has resonated strongly with players with more than 100,00 wishlists on Steam to date.

Key Features

  • Explore the Limbo Archipelago – Home to vibrant communities and ancient secrets.
  • Pilot Your Very Own Seaplane – Master ring challenges and enjoy the freedom of open skies.
  • Upgrade Your Gadgets – Expand your adventures. Scoop, build, glide and fish!
  • Personalize Your Seaplane – With vibrant skins and custom configurations.
  • Full Character Customization – Make your avatar uniquely yours, from hairstyle to outfits and accessories.
  • Build Your Island Base – decorate it and make Lou’s Lagoon feel like home.
  • A Mystery to Unravel – Piece together clues, follow Lou’s trail, and uncover the truth behind his disappearance!

Watch a new trailer below.

Story Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/lous-lagoon-adds-ps5-and-xbox-series-versions-launches-in-2026
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Aniplex, tri-Ace, and Lasengle announce PvP social deduction game OCTOPinbs for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Aniplex, and developers tri-Ace and Lasengle have announced OCTOPinbs, a multiplayer firefighters-versus-arsonists social deduction game for three-to-10 players. It will launch for PC via Steam this spring with English, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish, and Brazilian Portuguese language support.

Here is an overview of the game, via Aniplex:

About

A fire has broken out! Deploy to the scene immediately! An online multiplayer game for three-to-10 people.

Each game, players are randomly assigned one of two roles: the firefighters (octopuses) trying to extinguish the flames or the artists (squid) setting even more of them. Each side must work to outwit the other as they seek to achieve certain victory conditions.

If you reduce stage incineration to zero percent or incapacitate all artists by stuffing them into Octojars, it’s mission complete!

Take a peek at the rooms around you while spraying water, and keep your eyes peeled for suspicious players.

If you raise stage incineration to 100 percent or incapacitate all firefighters by stuffing them into Octojars, it’s mission complete!

Blend in with the firefighters by spraying the flames, but always be on the lookout for opportunities to spread more fires.

Body Lost? Revive ASAP!

Damage received from other players or fires can reduce your HP to zero, causing you to lose the body you’re borrowing.

Make a beeline for the fire truck to grab a new one and get back to work!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Octojars Reveal All!

Stuff suspicious players into Octojars to reveal their identities!

If the helmeted player is an artist (squid), that’s a win for the firefighters (octopuses).

If an innocent firefighter is stuffed inside, the firefighters will lose one of their comrades and need to proceed even more carefully.

The Artist’s Trump Card!

Artists can choose to reveal their true colors.

Their location will be revealed to the firefighters, but in exchange they’ll gain new abilities and greatly increase their mobility and HP.

If you’re close to victory—or have lost all hope but want to go out swinging—this is your chance to go wild and dominate the stage!

  • Practice various actions or view tutorials in the lobby!
  • Enjoy easy communication with emotes!
  • Customize match rules for an even more enjoyable experience!

Watch the announcement trailer below. Visit the official website here. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/aniplex-tri-ace-and-lasengle-announce-pvp-social-deduction-game-octopinbs-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hoa 2 announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher PM Studios and developer Skrollcat Studio have announced Hoa 2, a 3D adventure sequel to the side-scrolling puzzle platforming game Hoa. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam in 2026.

“Hoa has gone through a lot, and the world reflects what goes on inside her: freedom to explore with greater openness and mobility, but also a feeling of loss that comes with its own lesson,” said Skrollcat Studio game designer and founder Son Tung Cao in a press release. “Our task is to reflect this in both gameplay and world-building, and continue to tell Hoa’s story.”

PM Studios CEO Michael Yum added, “Hoa was a milestone for PM Studios, not just in terms of success, but how it connected to players on a deeply emotional level. It’s a unique blend of evocative storytelling, breathtaking art and intuitive gameplay that resonated strongly with players. We’re incredibly proud of the impact Hoa had and are proud to continue that journey with Hoa 2.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via PM Studios:

About

Hoa 2 opens a long, long time after Hoa closed with its emotionally charged ending, leaving fans wondering what happened to the namesake little fairy. The cycle of life brings her back to a homeland reshaped by time, and her old friends have long since passed. Alone in a world both familiar and changed, Hoa must find new purpose in this gentle and heartfelt tale of change, of letting go and moving forward.

Building upon the original’s hand-painted artistry and evocative sound design, Hoa 2 expands onto new territory, lending its childlike magic to lush, playful 3D environments and mechanics. Featuring richer, multi-layered environments and curious creatures to explore with more freedom—both in space and time – time itself becomes part of the puzzles with shifting lighting, and seasonal changes reshaping the landscape, puzzles and narrative moments.

Hoa 2 represents the studio’s most ambitious chapter yet, welcoming returning fans and new players alike to its magical world, now beautifully transformed.

Key Features

  • Be Immersed in Breathtaking Visuals – Hoa 2 takes you into a bigger world, yet still stunning to behold. Experience the signature beautiful hand-painted art-style, now in 3D.
  • Enjoy an Outstanding Audio Experience – Relax and unwind as you move through each amazing area, accompanied by soul-touching music, composed by the award-winning team from Hoa.
  • Ally With Nature to Solve Puzzles – Progressing through the world will require help, and the creatures of the world not only guide you but, over time, teach you wondrous new abilities that will change the way you explore. Work with them to solve light-hearted but engaging puzzles as you progress through the gorgeous areas.
  • Go for Achievements and Rewards – Hoa 2 features many challenging achievements and ultra-cute costumes for you to collect. Explore the world, discover secrets, and challenge yourself with fun & addictive minigames to unlock these rewards.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/hoa-2-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta launches April 28 in the west
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Digital pre-orders now available.

Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta will launch for Switch on April 28in the west, publishers XSEED Games and Marvelous Europe announced.

Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta first launched for Switch on May 22 in Japan. It is a port of Ys: Memories of Celceta, previously released for PlayStation 4, PC via Steam, and PS Vita, with newly arranged versions of all in-game background music.

The digital edition is now available for pre-order via Nintendo eShop for $29.99 with a 15 percent-off discount available through May 4.

A physical Day One Edition will be available for $59.99 via the Marvelous USA Online Store and at participating retailers. It includes a copy of the game, a 3D acrylic keychain / diorama set, a two-disc original soundtrack with 36 tracks, a set of five art cards featuring characters from the game, and a 21 inches-by-24 inches cloth map of Celceta, all housed within a specially illustrated outer box.

Here is an overview of the game, via XSEED Games:

About

World-famous adventurer Adol Christin awakens alone in the unfamiliar land of Celceta, remembering nothing more than his own name. Eager to unravel the mystery of his past and his current predicament, Adol begins his search for clues to his identity in a nearby town. Joined by the thief, Duren, who claims to have spent some time at his side these past weeks, the young adventurer soon earns the favor of the local Romun Army general. The general tasks the duo with documenting the untamed wilderness of the Great Forest of Celceta. Though none have ever returned from this dangerous quest, Adol sets off with Duren in hopes of reclaiming his lost memories. Along the way he meets numerous other individuals who seem to have encountered him before and must carefully determine who among them can be trusted.

Experience a timeless chapter in the storied RPG franchise making its debut on Nintendo Switch, filled with duplicitous schemes, treacherous geography, and secretive characters. As the adventure that immediately follows the events of Ys X: Nordics, and which laid the groundwork for gameplay systems that would be seen in Ys VIII: Lacrimosa of DANA and beyond, Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta is a special opportunity to go deeper into the series’ history and see the evolution that continues to drive its remarkable longevity. Explore and map out your way across a dangerous landscape, taking advantage of a unique tag-team party combat system that allows for creativity and strategy. Seek the truth of Adol’s past against the musical backdrop of a refreshed soundtrack. Re-awaken the spirit of adventure, exclusively on Nintendo Switch, in Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta.

Key Features

  • Exhilarating Party-Based Action – Strategic party battles challenge players to change their tactics on the fly, and allies can pick up new abilities in the midst of battle that can help them gain the advantage against powerful enemies.
  • Dynamic Exploration of a Dangerous Land – Celceta is a vast and mysterious land, filled with interesting people and thrilling adventures. Players can take advantage of a robust mapping system as they discover all the challenges and rewards that await.
  • Enhanced Musical Experience – The sweeping score guiding Adol’s journey through Celceta returns, along with a newly recorded, re-interpreted version, allowing players to choose their own auditory adventure.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/ys-memoire-revelations-in-celceta-launches-april-28-in-the-west
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu launches July 15
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Cooperative survival psychological horror game dated.

Cooperative survival psychological horror game The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on July 15, publisher Nacon and developer ACE Team announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nacon:

The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu is a purely cooperative gameplay experience, featuring a group of explorers during the Conquistador era, who must survive horror and madness.

You and your companions are on the deck of your galleon. El Capitán has given you a contract to fulfill: gather as much wealth as possible, find a missing person, locate an ancient fort, and, if possible, return safe and sound from this perilous expedition. As soon as you set foot on the shore, at the edge of the jungle, a vague sense of dread takes hold. In this jungle, treasures and mysteries await you, but so do unspeakable entities ready to make you regret ever setting foot in their territory.

At the beginning of each expedition in The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu, players form a group of up to 4 explorers and choose a contract to complete. Their mission is to collect treasures and identify new areas of the island to explore. They must act quickly because the longer the expedition lasts, the more numerous and dangerous the creatures become. The inventory is limited, and the basic weapons encourage avoiding conflict and defending oneself rather than playing aggressively.

The other danger that awaits the adventurers is the loss of their sanity. Faced with the cosmic horrors they confront, the players gradually fall victim to hallucinations: an ally appears as a monstrosity (or vice versa), an apparently harmless plain is actually a deadly pit, bushes seem to come to life, a rain of blood falls without warning… If the explorers return alive from their journey, El Capitán will be pleased… But he already has other contracts to offer them.

Inspired by H.P. Lovecraft’s cosmic horror short novel, The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu invites players to form a squad of two-to-four members to embark on an uncharted continent in search of a legendary city containing invaluable treasures.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-mound-omen-of-cthulhu-launches-july-15
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
